name: 032C
description: 032c is a Berlin fashion and culture brand founded by Joerg Koch in 2002. Known for graphic-driven, conceptual fashion with a strong connection to the Berlin arts and club scene, the brand operates at the intersection of culture and clothing.

name: 100 Hands
description: 100 Hands is an Amsterdam shirtmaker producing handmade shirts of extraordinary quality. Each shirt takes over 100 hours to complete by skilled craftspeople in Madras, India, representing one of the highest levels of shirtmaking craft available.

name: 3sixteen
description: 3sixteen is a New York menswear brand founded by Andrew Chen and Sung Choi in 2000. Known for Japanese selvedge denim, American workwear silhouettes, and a commitment to craft over novelty, the brand produces jeans, jackets, and shirts in limited runs using carefully selected fabrics woven in Japan.

name: 73London
description: 73London is a London brand focused on quality contemporary basics and casualwear.

name: A Day's March
description: A Day's March was founded in Stockholm in 2014. The brand produces refined, functional menswear with Scandinavian simplicity and quality European fabrics, aimed at building a practical, modern wardrobe.

name: A Kind of Guise
description: A Kind of Guise was founded in Munich in 2009. Known for relaxed, Mediterranean-influenced menswear with quality fabrics and a warm, sun-drenched sensibility rooted in the founders' Balkan heritage.

name: A.P.C.
description: A.P.C. was founded in Paris in 1987 by Jean Touitou. The initials stand for Atelier de Production et de Creation, and the brand is known for minimal French style, raw selvedge denim that develops a personal patina with wear, and quality basics at accessible prices.

name: A.PRESSE
description: A.PRESSE is a Japanese brand known for soft, relaxed tailoring and casualwear that draws from American vintage and European workwear references, with exceptional fabric sourcing and Japanese construction quality.

name: Ace Marks
description: Ace Marks is a New York footwear brand offering Blake-stitched dress shoes made in Civitanova Marche, Italy, at direct-to-consumer prices with a focus on quality leather and traditional construction.

name: Acne Studios
description: Acne Studios is a Swedish fashion house founded in Stockholm in 1996 by Jonny Johansson. Known for a conceptual approach to design, oversized and architectural silhouettes, distinctive denim, and a steady stream of culturally engaged work, the brand spans clothing, accessories, and art publishing.

name: Agolde
description: Agolde is a Los Angeles premium denim brand launched in 2014. Known for thoughtfully designed, flattering denim cuts in premium fabrics with a relaxed, lived-in aesthetic that endures season after season.

name: Aime Leon Dore
description: Aime Leon Dore was founded in Queens, New York by Teddy Santis in 2014. The brand blends New York streetwear with Ivy League prep, Mediterranean heritage, and 1990s sports culture, producing collections that feel nostalgic and entirely current at the same time.

name: Albam
description: Albam was founded in London in 2006 by Alastair Rae and James Shaw. Focused on producing excellent, understated British clothing, the brand carries out much of its production with skilled makers in the UK.

name: Albert Baucet
description: French artisan sock brand specializing in hunting socks. Knitted in a specialist workshop in Burgundy, France. Known for wool hunting knee-highs and garters. Sold exclusively through Mes Chaussettes Rouges.

name: Alden
description: Founded in Middleborough, Massachusetts in 1884, Alden is one of America's most respected traditional shoemakers. Known for shell cordovan and calf leather dress shoes built using Goodyear welt construction, the brand produces its footwear in the same New England factory where it has always operated.

name: Alex Mill
description: Alex Mill is a New York brand founded by Alex Drexler, son of J.Crew founder Mickey Drexler. Known for relaxed, quality American basics and casualwear with a contemporary sensibility.

name: Allen Edmonds
description: Allen Edmonds was founded in Port Washington, Wisconsin in 1922. The brand makes classic American dress shoes and boots using traditional Goodyear welt construction, and is known for its recrafting service, which allows worn pairs to be fully resoled and refurbished rather than replaced.

name: Ambrosi Napoli
description: Ambrosi Napoli is a Neapolitan trouser specialist founded by Salvatore Ambrosi. Known for producing some of the finest bespoke and made-to-order trousers in the world using traditional Neapolitan techniques.

name: American Giant
description: American Giant is a San Francisco brand founded in 2012 by Bayard Winthrop. It makes all of its clothing in the United States using premium domestic cotton, and is best known for its heavyweight hoodie, widely cited as one of the finest made in America.

name: American Trench
description: American Trench is a Philadelphia brand dedicated to American-made basics. It produces socks, ties, scarves, and base layers in domestic mills and factories, building a straightforward wardrobe of quality everyday essentials entirely within the United States.

name: Anderson and Sheppard
description: Anderson and Sheppard was founded on Savile Row in 1906. Known for the distinctive drape cut developed by Frederik Scholte, which influenced the wardrobe of the Prince of Wales and generations of Savile Row devotees.

name: Anglo-Italian
description: Anglo-Italian is a London brand founded by Charlie Thomas and Jake Grantham. Drawing from the intersection of British and Italian tailoring traditions, the brand produces quality suits, sport coats, and casualwear that synthesize the two schools with a confident, modern hand.

name: Another Aspect
description: Another Aspect is a London brand focused on clean, understated casualwear with quality fabrics and considered construction.

name: Anovair
description: Anovair is a premium outerwear brand focused on technical fabrics and sophisticated design for urban environments.

name: Anthology
description: Anthology is a Singapore-based menswear concept and brand known for curating and producing refined clothing with a Southeast Asian perspective on global menswear.

name: Aran Sweater Market
description: The Aran Sweater Market is a Galway retailer and manufacturer of traditional Aran sweaters, knitted using authentic patterns passed down through Irish families over generations.

name: Arpenteur
description: Arpenteur is a Parisian brand drawing from French outdoor and workwear heritage. Known for clean silhouettes in quality fabrics, the brand updates classic functional garments for contemporary wear with a quiet, considered approach.

name: Ascotchang
description: Ascot Chang is a Hong Kong shirtmaker founded in 1953. Known as one of the finest Asian bespoke shirtmakers, the house has locations in Hong Kong, New York, and Bangkok.

name: Asket
description: Asket was founded in Stockholm in 2015 by August Bard-Bringeus and Jakob Dworsky. The brand operates on a permanent collection with no seasonal drops, each piece designed to be the definitive version of that garment and made to last indefinitely.

name: Aspesi
description: Aspesi was founded in Milan in 1969 by Alberto Aspesi. Known for exceptional outerwear, particularly garment-dyed quilted jackets and field coats, the brand takes a pragmatic Italian approach to quality and lasting style.

name: Astorflex
description: Astorflex is an Italian footwear brand from Montebelluna. Known for soft, vegetable-tanned chukka boots and desert boots made using traditional construction, the brand emphasises natural materials and a supple, comfortable leather.

name: Athison
description: Italian braided leather goods maker, est. 1913. Specializes in vegetable-tanned leather belts, bags, and bracelets. Handmade in Italy.

name: Aubercy
description: Aubercy is a Parisian luxury shoemaker founded in 1935. Known for exceptional bespoke and ready-to-wear shoes with an understated, refined aesthetic rooted in the finest French shoemaking tradition.

name: August Special
description: August Special is a Stockholm brand focused on relaxed, premium basics and casualwear with a clean Scandinavian aesthetic.

name: Auralee
description: Auralee is a Tokyo label founded in 2015 by Ryota Iwai. Known for exceptional fabric development and understated, relaxed silhouettes, the brand favors material quality and subtle texture over decorative detail, producing clothing that rewards close attention.

name: Aurelien
description: Aurelien is a Paris-founded luxury accessories brand specializing in premium knitwear, scarves, and accessories made from cashmere and fine fibers in Italy. Founded on a direct-to-consumer model, it offers exceptional quality at fair prices.

name: AvVattev
description: AvVattev is a premium knitwear brand focused on quality basics in fine natural fibers.

name: AYR
description: AYR is a New York brand founded in 2014. Known for exceptional denim and premium basics with a focus on flattering fits and quality materials.

name: Banana Republic
description: Banana Republic was founded in San Francisco in 1978, initially selling safari and travel clothing. Now part of Gap Inc., the brand offers accessible smart casual and professional clothing for men and women.

name: Baracuta
description: Baracuta was founded in Manchester in 1937 by John and Isaac Miller. The brand created the iconic G9 Harrington jacket, worn by Elvis Presley, Steve McQueen, and a lineage of style icons from Mod Britain to present day.

name: Barbanera
description: Barbanera is an Italian footwear and accessories brand based in Rome. Known for premium made-in-Italy loafers, sneakers, and leather goods, the brand combines a distinctive artisan aesthetic with quality Italian craftsmanship.

name: Barbarian
description: Barbarian is a Canadian brand known for quality wool blankets and heritage outerwear with a strong sense of Canadian identity.

name: Barbour
description: Barbour was founded in South Shields, England in 1894 by John Barbour. The brand is known worldwide for its waxed cotton outerwear, particularly the Beaufort and Bedale jackets, worn across generations by the British countryside community and holders of the Royal Warrant.

name: Barena Venezia
description: Barena Venezia is a Venice-based Italian brand known for lightweight, unstructured tailoring and relaxed silhouettes in fine linens, cotton, and wool. It represents the kind of effortless Italian dressing that pairs substance with ease.

name: Barker
description: Barker is a Northampton shoemaker founded in 1880 by Arthur Barker. The brand produces classic English Goodyear-welted shoes at accessible prices within the long Northamptonshire shoemaking tradition.

name: Bather
description: Bather is a Toronto swimwear and resort wear brand known for quality swimwear, shorts, and accessories designed for active coastal life.

name: Batoner
description: Batoner is a Japanese knitwear brand producing premium handcrafted sweaters and knitwear in Japan using traditional techniques and exceptional natural yarns.

name: Baudoin and Lange
description: Baudoin and Lange is a London-based footwear brand known for its premium loafers crafted in Portugal, distinguished by the distinctive sagan split-toe detail that runs across many of its signature styles.

name: Beams Plus
description: Beams Plus is a sub-label of Japanese retailer Beams, focused on American Ivy League and workwear heritage reinterpreted through a Japanese lens. The brand regularly collaborates with iconic American labels on limited-edition pieces that reward the enthusiast.

name: Beckett Simonon
description: Beckett Simonon produces premium leather shoes using Goodyear and Blake welt construction at direct-to-consumer prices, offering strong craftsmanship without the traditional retail markup.

name: Begg & Co
description: Begg and Co is a Scottish textile manufacturer based in Ayr. The brand produces exceptional cashmere and lambswool scarves, stoles, and accessories on traditional power looms using Scottish-milled yarns.

name: Bellief
description: Bellief is a premium knitwear brand focused on quality basics in fine natural fibers.

name: Belstaff
description: Belstaff was founded in Longbridge, Staffordshire in 1924. Known for its waxed cotton motorcycle jackets worn by Steve McQueen and Che Guevara, the brand now produces premium leather jackets and outerwear that carry the same spirit of adventure.

name: Berg & Berg
description: Berg and Berg is a Stockholm brand known for premium neckwear, scarves, and accessories in fine fabrics including cashmere, wool, and silk, produced primarily in Italy.

name: Berluti
description: Berluti is a Parisian luxury shoemaker and leather goods brand founded in 1895 by Alessandro Berluti. Known for extraordinary leather patination and bespoke shoemaking, the house has expanded to ready-to-wear clothing under the LVMH umbrella.

name: Berwick 1707
description: Berwick 1707 is a Spanish shoemaker producing Goodyear-welted shoes in classic English styles at competitive prices, offering strong value within the tradition of English shoemaking.

name: Bigi
description: Bigi is a Milanese neckwear brand with a long history in the Italian tie-making tradition. Known for quality silk ties and accessories, the brand has been a reference for Italian neckwear for decades.

name: Billy Reid
description: Billy Reid is a Florence, Alabama fashion brand founded by Billy Reid in 2004. Known for American Southern sensibility combined with tailored quality, the brand produces suits, shirts, and casualwear with genuine regional character.

name: Bleu de Paname
description: Bleu de Paname is a Paris brand drawing on French workwear heritage. Known for clean, functional garments in robust fabrics, the brand celebrates the traditional aesthetic of French labour culture with modern cut and proportion.

name: Blkbrd Shoemaker
description: Blkbrd Shoemaker is a small premium footwear brand producing Blake-stitched and welted shoes with a focus on quality leathers and clean, unfussy design.

name: Blue Blue Japan
description: Blue Blue Japan is a Tokyo brand known for indigo-dyed textiles and garments using traditional Japanese dyeing techniques, combining craft heritage with a refined contemporary sensibility.

name: Blundstone
description: Blundstone is a Tasmanian bootmaker established in 1870. Known for their elasticated-sided Chelsea boots, originally designed for Australian workers, the brand is now a global footwear staple valued for comfort, durability, and ease of wear.

name: Boglioli
description: Boglioli is an Italian tailoring brand founded in Brescia in 1890. Known for unstructured, floating-canvas jackets that represent one of the most relaxed and deconstructed approaches in the Italian tailoring tradition.

name: Bonobos
description: Bonobos was founded in New York in 2007 by Andy Dunn and Brian Spaly. The brand pioneered the concept of better-fitting chinos and expanded into a full men's wardrobe, building its identity on superior fit and accessible pricing.

name: Bontoni
description: Bontoni is an Italian luxury footwear brand producing handcrafted shoes of the highest quality using traditional techniques and exceptional leathers in Italy.

name: Bordon Boots
description: Bordon Boots is a Colombian bootmaker producing quality handcrafted leather boots using traditional construction methods.

name: Bosie Knitwear
description: Bosie Knitwear is a British brand focused on quality natural-fiber knitwear made in the UK using traditional techniques.

name: Bottega Veneta
description: Bottega Veneta was founded in Vicenza, Italy in 1966. The Italian luxury house is known for its intrecciato woven leather technique and an approach to luxury that relies on craft and material quality rather than visible branding.

name: Brass Tokyo
description: Brass Tokyo is a Tokyo brand known for quality menswear with a blend of Japanese and international references.

name: Bresciani
description: Italian luxury sock maker since 1970. Family-owned, based near Mantua. Works with the finest yarns including cashmere, silk, Egyptian cotton, linen, and vicuna. Hand-linked toes, 100% made in Italy. Also produces underwear in Sea Island cotton and cashmere.

name: Bridlen
description: Bridlen is a New Delhi brand producing bespoke and made-to-measure shirts and accessories with a focus on exceptional Indian fabrics and traditional handcraft.

name: Bronson Mfg. Co.
description: Bronson Mfg. Co. is a Chinese brand dedicated to meticulous reproduction of American vintage workwear and military clothing. The brand produces selvedge denim, chinos, and jackets with extraordinary attention to historical detail and period-accurate construction.

name: Brooks Brothers
description: Brooks Brothers was founded in New York in 1818, making it America's oldest clothing retailer. The brand pioneered the button-down collar shirt and the ready-to-wear suit in the United States, and remains a cornerstone of American trad and Ivy League style.

name: Brunello Cucinelli
description: Brunello Cucinelli was founded in Solomeo, Umbria in 1978. Known for exceptional cashmere, understated design, and a humanistic business philosophy centred on the dignity of labour, the brand produces some of the finest knitwear and casualwear in Italy.

name: Brut
description: Brut is a Paris brand inspired by French cycling culture and classic sportswear, producing quality basics and casualwear.

name: Bryceland's
description: Bryceland's is a brand based in Tokyo and Hong Kong known for quality tailoring and casualwear, rooted in a deep appreciation for both Japanese and Western heritage clothing.

name: Buck Mason
description: Buck Mason was founded in Los Angeles in 2013. The brand makes American-made basics and casual clothing, particularly T-shirts, jeans, and chinos, with a focus on lasting quality and value.

name: Buzz Rickson's
description: Buzz Rickson's is a Japanese brand by Toyo Enterprise dedicated to authentic reproduction of American military flight jackets. It covers the full arc from Second World War-era A-2 and MA-1 models to Vietnam-era nylon jackets, using period-accurate materials and hardware throughout.

name: Cad & The Dandy
description: Cad and The Dandy is a Savile Row tailor founded in London in 2008 by James Sleater and Ian Meiers. The house offers traditional and contemporary bespoke and made-to-measure tailoring on Savile Row at accessible prices.

name: Camoshita
description: Camoshita is a Tokyo menswear brand known for relaxed tailoring and casualwear that draws from Japanese, Italian, and American references in exceptional fabrics.

name: Canada Goose
description: Canada Goose was founded in Toronto in 1957 by Sam Tick. The brand makes down-filled parkas built for extreme cold, originally worn by researchers and expedition teams in the Arctic, and now a recognised urban winter outerwear standard.

name: Canali
description: Canali is an Italian tailoring house founded in Triuggio in 1934 by Giovanni and Giacomo Canali. Known for impeccably made suits and jackets in quality fabrics, the brand combines traditional Italian craft with consistent, reliable quality.

name: Carhartt WIP
description: Carhartt WIP is the European arm of American workwear giant Carhartt, launched in 1994. It reinterprets classic Carhartt work garments in lighter fabrics, drawing a following across street, skate, and music subcultures worldwide.

name: Carlos Santos
description: Carlos Santos is a Portuguese shoemaker based in Sao Joao da Madeira. The brand produces high-quality Goodyear-welted dress shoes and boots offering significant value relative to their level of craft and material quality.

name: Carmina
description: Carmina is a family-owned Spanish shoemaker based in Inca, Mallorca, founded by the Segui family. The brand makes high-quality Goodyear-welted shoes across a wide variety of lasts, combining Spanish craftsmanship with competitive pricing.

name: Caruso
description: Caruso is an Italian tailoring manufacturer based in Soragna, Emilia-Romagna. The brand produces suits for numerous luxury houses as well as under its own label, known for quality construction and a cleaner, more structured silhouette than Neapolitan houses.

name: Casatlantic
description: Casatlantic is a small Portuguese brand producing quality casualwear and accessories inspired by the Atlantic coast and the seafaring traditions of Portugal.

name: Cavour
description: Cavour is a premium Italian menswear brand known for quality tailoring and casualwear.

name: Cesare Attolini
description: Cesare Attolini is a Neapolitan tailoring house founded by Vincenzo Attolini, widely credited as the creator of the modern Neapolitan jacket. The house continues his legacy of hand-padded construction and the light, draped Neapolitan silhouette that has influenced menswear worldwide.

name: Charles Tyrwhitt
description: Charles Tyrwhitt is a London shirt brand founded in 1986 by Nick Wheeler, who named the company after his middle names. Known for quality dress shirts, suits, and accessories sold direct to consumer, the brand has built a following on consistent quality at accessible prices.

name: Cheaney
description: Cheaney is a Northampton shoemaker with roots going back to 1886. The brand produces classically crafted Goodyear-welted shoes and boots in the long tradition of English shoemaking.

name: Christian Dior
description: Christian Dior was founded in Paris in 1946 by Christian Dior. The house revived French fashion after the Second World War with the New Look and continues to produce luxury ready-to-wear, accessories, and fragrance under the LVMH umbrella.

name: Christian Kimber
description: Christian Kimber is a Melbourne accessories brand founded by Christian Kimber. The brand designs premium loafers, sneakers, and accessories in Australia and makes them in Portugal, with a focus on relaxed, refined everyday footwear.

name: Church's
description: Church's is a Northampton shoemaker founded in 1873 by Thomas Church. One of England's most storied shoemakers, the brand produces Goodyear-welted shoes and boots from its own factory. Acquired by Prada in 1999, it continues production in Northampton.

name: Cifonelli
description: Cifonelli is a Parisian tailoring house founded in 1936 by Lorenzo Cifonelli, who moved from Rome to join his uncle's Paris atelier. Known for the distinctive Cifonelli shoulder, an architectural rolled sleeve head that is among the most recognisable marks in bespoke tailoring.

name: Closed
description: Closed is a German denim brand founded in Hamburg in 1978. Known for premium selvedge denim and refined European casualwear, the brand balances quality fabrics with clean, lasting design and a distinctly European sensibility.

name: Club Monaco
description: Club Monaco was founded in Toronto in 1985 by Joe Mimran. The brand offers refined modern basics and tailoring with a minimalist, cosmopolitan aesthetic suited to the modern professional wardrobe.

name: Cobbler Union
description: Cobbler Union is a premium footwear brand producing Goodyear-welted shoes in Spain across a range of classic styles and quality leathers, offering strong construction at an attainable price point.

name: Coherence
description: Coherence is a Japanese label founded in 2014 by Kohei Onoda. Known for relaxed, thoughtfully constructed casualwear that combines Japanese precision with European sensibility, with particular strength in outerwear.

name: Colhay's
description: Colhay's is a London brand founded by Tom Chamberlin, focused on British-made knitwear using traditional techniques and quality domestic wool.

name: Cookman
description: Cookman is a Japanese brand known for its distinctive chef-pant silhouette adapted for casualwear. The brand produces wide-leg trousers and casualwear with a culinary-inspired aesthetic that has found a broad following.

name: Corneliani
description: Corneliani is an Italian tailoring house based in Mantua, founded in 1958. Known for quality suits and jackets that combine traditional Italian craftsmanship with consistent production quality, the brand offers exceptional value.

name: Corthay
description: Corthay is a Parisian luxury shoemaker founded in 1990 by Pierre Corthay. Known for exceptionally refined bespoke and ready-to-wear shoes with distinctive aesthetic details and masterful leather patination.

name: COS
description: COS was founded in London in 2007 as a concept store by the H&M Group. The brand is known for architectural, minimalist clothing with an emphasis on quality fabrics and considered construction at accessible prices.

name: CP Company
description: CP Company was founded by Massimo Osti in Bologna in 1975. The brand is known for technical outerwear, particularly the iconic goggle jacket, and for pioneering the use of innovative fabrics and garment-dyeing techniques in casualwear.

name: Crescent Down Works
description: Crescent Down Works is a Seattle brand producing exceptional down and wool outerwear. Drawing from American outdoor heritage and made in the Pacific Northwest, the brand is known for quality construction and lasting warmth.

name: Crockett & Jones
description: Crockett and Jones is a Northampton shoemaker founded in 1879 by Charles Jones and Sir James Crockett. One of England's most respected Goodyear-welted shoemakers, the brand produces a vast range of classic English shoes and boots from its own Northampton factory.

name: Crown Northampton
description: Crown Northampton is a Northampton-based shoemaker producing Goodyear-welted shoes and boots in the classic English tradition at accessible prices.

name: Dale of Norway
description: Dale of Norway was founded in 1879 in Dale, Hordaland. Known for traditional Norwegian-pattern wool sweaters and knitwear, the brand has produced official Olympic team knitwear for Norway and is a benchmark for Scandinavian knitwear craft.

name: Danner
description: Danner is a Portland, Oregon boot brand founded in 1932 by Charles Danner. Known for rugged work and hiking boots including the iconic Mountain Light, the brand builds its footwear using traditional stitchdown construction in its own factory.

name: Danton
description: Danton is a Japanese brand inspired by French outdoor and work clothing heritage. Known for clean, functional outerwear in quality fabrics with a muted, earthy palette, the brand has a broad and lasting appeal across casual and workwear markets.

name: De Bonne Facture
description: De Bonne Facture was founded in Paris by Guillaume Sagot and Nicolas Gabard. Known for garments produced by master craftspeople in traditional ateliers, the brand focuses on heritage fabrics and French and European manufacture.

name: Dehen 1920
description: Dehen 1920 is a Portland, Oregon knitwear maker founded in 1920. The brand specializes in American-made varsity jackets, baseball jerseys, and athletic knitwear using traditional techniques unchanged since the company was established.

name: Derek Rose
description: Derek Rose is a London luxury loungewear and sleepwear brand founded in 1926. Known for exceptional quality pajamas, robes, and leisure clothing in fine fabrics including Sea Island cotton and fine merino.

name: Document
description: Document is a Japanese brand founded by designer Keisuke Nagami. Known for clean, subtle casualwear with exceptional fabric and construction quality, the brand takes a quiet and precise approach to contemporary menswear.

name: Doppiaa
description: Doppiaa is an Italian menswear brand based in Arezzo, Tuscany. Known for quality tailored jackets and suits with a relaxed, practical sensibility and exceptional fabric sourcing.

name: Drakes
description: Drakes was founded in London in 1977 and is one of the foremost English makers of ties and accessories. The brand has expanded to a full menswear collection known for quality fabrics and considered, understated British design.

name: Drumohr
description: Drumohr is a Scottish knitwear brand founded in 1770 in West Lothian. The brand produces fine merino and lambswool knitwear using traditional techniques, representing one of Scotland's oldest continuous textile traditions.

name: DrÃ´le de Monsieur
description: Drole de Monsieur is a Paris brand known for graphic T-shirts, sweatshirts, and casualwear with an irreverent French sensibility and quality premium basics that hold up to repeated wear.

name: E. Marinella
description: E. Marinella is a Neapolitan neckwear maker and accessories shop founded in 1914 by Eugenio Marinella on the Riviera di Chiaia in Naples. Known as one of the world's finest neckwear houses, the brand produces handmade seven-fold ties in exceptional silks.

name: East Harbour Surplus
description: East Harbour Surplus is an Italian brand known for military surplus-inspired casualwear and outerwear, drawing from vintage workwear and military archives with an Italian eye for material and cut.

name: Eastlogue
description: Eastlogue is a Korean brand founded in 2013 producing quality outerwear and casualwear that draws from American and Japanese vintage references with a distinctly Korean eye for proportion and detail.

name: eckhauslatta
description: Eckhaus Latta was founded in New York in 2015 by Mike Eckhaus and Zoe Latta. Known for avant-garde, conceptual fashion made in New York with unconventional fabrics and a challenging, genuinely independent design approach.

name: Ede & Ravenscroft
description: Ede and Ravenscroft was founded in London in 1689. The oldest established tailor in England and official robe makers to the British royal family, the house also makes academic and legal robes for institutions worldwide.

name: Edward Green
description: Edward Green is a Northampton shoemaker founded in 1890. Widely regarded as one of the finest ready-to-wear shoemakers in England, the brand is known for its distinctive lasts, exceptional leather quality, and meticulous construction.

name: Edwin
description: Edwin is a Japanese denim brand founded in Tokyo in 1947. One of the pioneering Japanese denim brands, Edwin was among the first to introduce American-style jeans to the Japanese market and has produced quality denim ever since.

name: Emma Willis
description: Emma Willis is a Jermyn Street shirtmaker founded by Emma Willis. Known for bespoke and made-to-measure shirts of exceptional quality using the finest cotton fabrics available.

name: Engineered Garments
description: Engineered Garments is a New York brand by Japanese designer Daiki Suzuki. Known for deconstructed garments that blend American military and workwear references with Japanese sensibility, the brand produces pieces in limited quantities that reward the curious wearer.

name: Enzo Bonafe
description: Enzo Bonafe is a Bologna-based shoemaker founded in 1963. The brand produces fully handmade shoes using traditional Bologna stitch-through construction, known for extraordinary leather quality and a level of finishing that approaches bespoke standards.

name: Epaulet
description: Epaulet is a Brooklyn brand founded by Mike and Kyle Muse. Known for exceptional trousers in quality fabrics, including their celebrated Rivet Chino program, as well as shirts and outerwear that share the same ethos of considered craft.

name: Eton Shirts
description: Eton Shirts is a Swedish shirtmaker founded in 1928 in Gangbro. The brand is known for fine dress shirts that combine Scandinavian functionality with Italian style influences, made in Sweden.

name: Evan Kinori
description: Evan Kinori is a San Francisco brand known for quietly exceptional garments in premium natural fabrics, produced in extremely limited quantities with a focus on simplicity and craft.

name: Everlane
description: Everlane was founded in San Francisco in 2010 by Michael Preysman. Known for radical price transparency and quality basics at fair prices, the brand produces premium T-shirts, denim, and accessories.

name: Faherty Brand
description: Faherty Brand is a New York lifestyle brand founded in 2013 by twin brothers Alex and Mike Faherty. Known for relaxed, coastal-inspired clothing made with an emphasis on durability and responsible production.

name: Falconeri
description: Falconeri is an Italian knitwear brand known for fine cashmere, merino, and linen knitwear at accessible prices, producing a broad range of classic and contemporary styles.

name: Far Afield
description: Far Afield is a British brand inspired by traditional textile craftsmanship from around the world. Known for quality shirts in handwoven fabrics and bold prints, the brand has a particular connection to Japanese textiles and artisan weaving traditions.

name: Fedeli
description: Fedeli is an Italian knitwear brand from Ferrara known for exceptional cashmere and fine knitwear, with a heritage of craftsmanship in natural fibers spanning multiple decades.

name: Filson
description: Filson is a Seattle outfitter founded in 1897 during the Klondike Gold Rush. Known for rugged Mackinaw cruiser jackets and tin cloth bags, the brand makes its goods in Seattle, building each piece to withstand a lifetime of hard use.

name: Finamore
description: Finamore is a Neapolitan shirtmaker established in 1925. Known for soft, hand-stitched collars and refined construction, the brand produces shirts in ready-to-wear and made-to-order that carry the best of the Neapolitan shirtmaking tradition.

name: Fisherman Out of Ireland
description: Fisherman Out of Ireland is an Irish knitwear brand based in County Wicklow. The brand produces traditional Aran and Irish knitwear using authentic patterns and techniques passed down through generations.

name: Flint and Tinder
description: Flint and Tinder is an American brand and Huckberry sub-label producing American-made basics and outerwear. Known for their 10-year hoodie guarantee and a strong commitment to US manufacturing.

name: Folk
description: Folk was founded in London in 2001 by Cathal McAteer. Known for relaxed, well-constructed British clothing with quality fabrics and an understated, eclectic aesthetic that draws from craft, music, and the arts.

name: ForÃ©t
description: Foret is a Copenhagen outdoor brand founded in 2019 by Tommy Guldager. Known for high-quality technical outerwear and fleece for outdoor activities with a clean, Scandinavian design language.

name: Foster And Son
description: Foster and Son is a Jermyn Street bootmaker founded in the 1840s. One of the great old houses of English bootmaking, the brand produces bespoke and made-to-measure shoes and boots of the highest quality.

name: Frank And Oak
description: Frank And Oak is a Montreal sustainable menswear brand founded in 2012. Known for modern basics and smart casual clothing produced with a focus on responsible sourcing and quality materials.

name: Frank Leder
description: Frank Leder is a Berlin-based German designer known for garments made from traditional European fabrics and artisanal techniques, often drawing from peasant, folk, and Alpine traditions.

name: Freenote Cloth
description: Freenote Cloth is a San Marcos, California brand producing handcrafted American heritage clothing including selvedge denim and vintage-inspired shirts made with genuine attention to craft.

name: Frescobol Carioca
description: Frescobol Carioca is a Rio de Janeiro swimwear brand founded in 1992. Known for wooden Frescobol beach paddle sets and beautifully designed swimwear, the brand carries a distinctly Brazilian coastal identity.

name: FrizmWORKS
description: FrizmWORKS is a Seoul brand known for elevated basics and workwear-inspired garments with a Korean sensibility and quality materials.

name: Fujito
description: Fujito is a Tokyo label known for relaxed, voluminous silhouettes and exceptional fabric selection, with particular strength in knitwear and outerwear.

name: Fullcount
description: Fullcount is an Okayama denim brand founded in 1992 by Mikiharu Tsujita. The brand produces high-quality selvedge denim with a focus on authentic construction and reproduction accuracy.

name: Gammarelli
description: Tailor to the papacy since 1798, based behind the Pantheon in Rome. Six generations of the Gammarelli family have outfitted popes, cardinals, and bishops. Their socks come in cotton lisle, merino wool, and silk, in the traditional colours of the clergy: red, purple, black, and white.

name: Gaziano & Girling
description: Gaziano and Girling is a Northampton shoemaker founded in 2006 by Tony Gaziano and Dean Girling. Regarded as one of the finest shoemakers in England, the brand produces exceptionally elegant Goodyear-welted shoes from its own factory.

name: georgecleverley
description: George Cleverley is a London shoemaker known for a distinctive chiseled toe shape developed by its founder. The house continues to produce bespoke and ready-to-wear shoes for a discerning international clientele.

name: Gitman Vintage
description: Gitman Vintage is the heritage line of Gitman Bros., made in Ashland, Pennsylvania. Known for premium dress and casual shirts using quality fabrics in classic patterns and limited-edition prints.

name: Giuliva Heritage
description: Giuliva Heritage was founded in 2018 by Giulia Cataldi and Henrique Athayde. Known for quality tailored pieces in exceptional fabrics, produced in the finest Italian workshops with a feminine, relaxed elegance.

name: Glanshirt
description: Glanshirt is an Italian shirt brand from the Slowear group. The brand produces high-quality shirts in refined fabrics for both casual and formal occasions, with the quality and attention to detail associated with the Slowear family.

name: Good Man Brand
description: Good Man Brand is a premium American basics brand known for quality casualwear including T-shirts, polos, and knitwear in fine natural fabrics.

name: GORAL
description: GORAL is a British footwear brand producing quality Goodyear-welted shoes and boots in the English tradition.

name: Gran Sasso
description: Gran Sasso is an Italian knitwear brand based in Sant'Egidio alla Vibrata, Abruzzo. One of Italy's leading producers of fine-gauge knitwear in merino, cashmere, and linen, the brand offers exceptional quality at accessible prices.

name: Grant Stone
description: Grant Stone is an Omaha, Nebraska footwear brand founded by Wyatt Gilmore. The brand produces Goodyear-welted shoes and boots using premium leathers, made to traditional standards with a contemporary design sensibility.

name: Graph Zero
description: Graph Zero is a Japanese brand known for indigo-dyed and naturally coloured fabrics and garments, using traditional Japanese dyeing techniques.

name: Grenson
description: Grenson is a Northampton shoemaker founded in 1866 by William Green. One of England's oldest remaining shoemakers, the brand is known for quality Goodyear-welted shoes and for being among the first to introduce the brogue pattern.

name: Gustin
description: Gustin was founded in San Francisco in 2012. The brand produces American-made selvedge denim and premium basics using a crowdfunding production model, giving customers direct input into what gets made.

name: Hamilton Shirts
description: Hamilton Shirts is a Memphis, Tennessee shirtmaker founded in 1883. One of America's oldest shirtmakers, the brand produces handcrafted dress shirts in its own factory using traditional construction.

name: Hansen Garments
description: Hansen Garments is a Danish brand founded by Lars Philip Hansen. The brand produces functional, relaxed outerwear and clothing inspired by outdoor heritage with Scandinavian simplicity in every piece.

name: Harris Wharf London
description: Harris Wharf London is a London brand known for quality coats and jackets in British and European wools, with a particular connection to the Harris Tweed tradition and British textile craft.

name: HAVEN
description: HAVEN is a Vancouver retailer and brand known for curating premium technical and lifestyle clothing, with a particular focus on Japanese and niche international brands.

name: Hawes & Curtis
description: Hawes and Curtis is a London shirtmaker founded in 1913. One of the heritage houses of Jermyn Street, the brand is known for quality dress shirts and formalwear.

name: Heimat Textil
description: Heimat Textil is a German textile brand from the Schwabian Alb region. Known for authentic loop-wheeled socks, T-shirts, and athletic garments using traditional German manufacturing techniques, the brand produces goods of real technical distinction.

name: Herill
description: Herill is a Japanese brand known for premium knitwear using exceptional natural fibers, with a focus on traditional techniques and luxury materials.

name: Herno
description: Herno was founded in Lesa, Lake Maggiore in 1948. Known for premium down jackets and technical outerwear that balance Italian elegance with performance, the brand produces its outerwear in the Piedmont region of Italy.

name: Herring Shoes
description: Herring Shoes is a British footwear retailer and brand selling Goodyear-welted shoes from a range of English and European manufacturers at accessible prices.

name: Heschung
description: Heschung is a French footwear brand founded in Alsace in 1934. Known for quality dress shoes and boots made in France using traditional construction, the brand carries a distinctive French aesthetic across its range.

name: Hestra
description: Hestra is a Swedish glove maker founded in 1936 in Hestra, Smaland. Known for producing some of the world's finest leather gloves, from everyday styles to specialised skiing and work gloves.

name: Hilditch & Key
description: Hilditch and Key is a London shirtmaker on Jermyn Street founded in 1899. One of the classic English shirt houses, the brand is known for quality dress shirts and formal accessories.

name: Hiro Yanagimachi
description: Hiro Yanagimachi is a Tokyo shoemaker known for handcrafted bespoke and made-to-order shoes of extraordinary quality, combining Japanese precision with European technique.

name: Holzweiler
description: Holzweiler was founded in Oslo in 2012 by Andreas and Susanne Holzweiler. Known for their distinctive mohair scarves, which became a Scandinavian fashion icon, and a growing ready-to-wear collection that carries the same sensibility.

name: House of Blanks
description: House of Blanks is a British brand focused on premium-quality blank T-shirts and sweatshirts in exceptional cotton fabrics.

name: Husbands
description: Husbands is a Parisian tailor and brand founded by Nicolas Gabard. Known for relaxed, modern tailoring with a Parisian sensibility, the brand combines traditional craft with contemporary wearability.

name: Incotex
description: Incotex is a Venice-based Italian trouser specialist founded in 1951, part of the Slowear group. Widely regarded as producing the finest chinos and dress trousers in Italy, the brand uses top-grade fabrics and impeccable construction throughout.

name: Informale
description: Informale is an Australian menswear brand known for relaxed, quality casualwear designed for the Australian lifestyle and climate.

name: Inis MeÃ¡in
description: Inis Mean is an Irish knitwear brand based on the island of Inis Mean off the west coast of Ireland. Using traditional Aran stitches and locally sourced yarns, the brand produces handcrafted knitwear that connects directly to the island's weaving tradition.

name: Inverallan
description: Inverallan is a Scottish knitwear brand from Nairn. Known for exceptional hand-framed knitwear using traditional cable and textured patterns in heavyweight wool, the brand produces garments of great substance and warmth.

name: IrelandsEye
description: IrelandsEye is an Irish knitwear brand with roots in the traditional craft of the Aran Islands. The brand produces authentic cable-knit garments and accessories in natural Irish wool.

name: Iron Heart
description: Iron Heart is an Okayama-based Japanese denim brand founded by Goro Nagata in 1990. Known for producing some of the world's heaviest selvedge denim, including their legendary 21oz fabric, the brand holds uncompromising standards in construction and material quality.

name: Isaia
description: Isaia is a Neapolitan tailoring house founded in 1920. Known for luxurious ready-to-wear and made-to-measure suits with exceptional fabrics and Neapolitan soft construction, the brand is a benchmark of refined Italian tailoring.

name: J. FitzPatrick
description: J. FitzPatrick is a New York footwear brand producing Blake-stitched dress shoes in Italy, known for wide toe boxes and quality leathers at accessible prices.

name: J.Crew
description: J.Crew was founded in New York in 1983. Known for preppy, accessible American basics and smart casual clothing, the brand had an influential period of editorial fashion direction and continues to offer a broad American wardrobe.

name: J.M. Weston
description: J.M. Weston is a French luxury shoemaker founded in Limoges in 1891 by Edouard Blanchard. Known for the iconic 180 Loafer and Chasse boot, the brand combines traditional craft with French elegance in shoes designed to improve with age and long wear.

name: Jacob CohÃ«n
description: Jacob Cohen is an Italian denim brand from Fermo known for premium five-pocket jeans in exceptional denim with fine sartorial details, including authentic suede patches and hand-stitched accents that set them apart from standard denim.

name: Jacquemus
description: Jacquemus was founded in Paris in 2009 by Simon Porte Jacquemus. Known for minimalist, sun-drenched design inspired by the South of France, the brand combines playful proportions with quality fabrics and genuine emotional warmth.

name: James Coward
description: James Coward is a small British brand known for quality casualwear and accessories.

name: Japan Blue Jeans
description: Japan Blue Jeans is a Kojima, Okayama denim brand producing high-quality selvedge denim using Japanese looms and traditional techniques, often with unique fabric compositions including mixed-fiber weaves.

name: Jil Sander
description: Jil Sander was founded in Hamburg in 1968 by Jil Sander. Known as the queen of less, the brand set the standard for modern minimalism in high fashion and continues to produce rigorously beautiful clothing under the direction of Luke and Lucie Meier.

name: Jim Green
description: Jim Green is a Canadian bootmaker producing quality work and outdoor boots using traditional construction in their own factory.

name: John Lobb
description: John Lobb was founded in London in 1849 and is one of the most prestigious names in footwear. The ready-to-wear line is made in Northampton while the bespoke service operates from the Paris maison on the Rue Saint-Honore.

name: John Lofgren
description: John Lofgren is a Japanese brand producing high-quality reproduction workwear and boots inspired by American heritage, made in Japan with extraordinary attention to historical detail and period-accurate construction.

name: John Smedley
description: John Smedley is an English knitwear manufacturer established at Lea Mills in Derbyshire in 1784. The world's oldest operating garment manufacturing company, it is known for extra-fine merino and sea island cotton knitwear of exceptional softness.

name: Johnstons of Elgin
description: Johnstons of Elgin is a Scottish textile manufacturer founded in 1797 in Elgin, Moray. One of the few remaining vertically integrated textile mills in Britain, the brand is known for exceptional cashmere and lambswool fabrics and finished knitwear.

name: Joseph Cheaney
description: Joseph Cheaney is a Northampton shoemaker with roots going back to 1886. Family-owned and operated, the brand produces Goodyear-welted shoes and boots in its own factory using traditional English methods inherited across generations.

name: Justo Gimeno
description: Justo Gimeno is a Spanish footwear brand from Valencia. Known for quality loafers and casual shoes with a warm Mediterranean sensibility and traditional Spanish craftsmanship.

name: Kanata
description: Kanata is an Ontario, Canada knit brand producing warm, practical sweaters and knitwear from quality domestic wools, including their distinctive cowichan-inspired styles that draw on traditional Canadian handcraft.

name: Kaptain Sunshine
description: Kaptain Sunshine is a Tokyo brand founded in 2012. Known for relaxed, well-crafted garments drawing from American Ivy League, outdoor, and workwear heritage filtered through a Japanese sensibility.

name: Kartik Research
description: Kartik Research is a small brand focused on natural dyes and traditional textile techniques, producing limited quantities of distinctive garments that reflect deep research into dyeing craft.

name: Kent Wang
description: Kent Wang is a New York accessories and clothing brand known for quality neckwear, dress shirts, and accessories at accessible prices, with a focus on classic American and English style.

name: KESTIN
description: KESTIN is a Scottish brand founded in Edinburgh by Kestin Hare. Known for functional, technical garments made in Britain and Europe with an emphasis on quality fabrics and purposeful construction suited to the Scottish climate and landscape.

name: Kiko Kostadinov
description: Kiko Kostadinov is a Bulgarian-born, London-based designer known for collections with complex construction and unusual fabric combinations, produced in limited quantities with genuine technical ambition.

name: Kith
description: Kith is a New York retailer and lifestyle brand founded by Ronnie Fieg in 2011. Known for premium footwear collaborations and elevated basics, the brand has flagship stores in New York, Los Angeles, Miami, Tokyo, and Paris.

name: Kiton
description: Kiton is a Neapolitan luxury tailoring house founded in 1956 by Ciro Paone. Known for producing some of the most labor-intensive ready-to-wear suits in the world, each requiring over 25 hours of hand-tailoring in the finest available fabrics.

name: Kotn
description: Kotn is a Toronto brand founded in 2015. The brand makes Egyptian cotton basics in Cairo in partnership with family-owned factories, with a commitment to transparency and fair wages throughout the supply chain.

name: L'Estrange London
description: L'Estrange London was founded in 2014. The brand produces versatile, high-quality basics and tailoring designed to transition seamlessly from work to leisure with minimal effort.

name: L.B.M. 1911
description: L.B.M. 1911 is an Italian jacket specialist founded in 1911 in Citta di Castello, part of the Lubiam group. Known for lightweight unstructured jackets in fine fabrics, the brand combines traditional Italian craft with modern, easy wearability.

name: La Botte Gardiane
description: La Botte Gardiane is a French bootmaker based in the Camargue region of southern France. Known for handcrafted riding boots and gardian boots rooted in the traditional craft of the Camargue cowboys.

name: La Paz
description: La Paz was founded in Portugal in 2012, inspired by the Portuguese fishing and sailing community. Known for quality striped T-shirts, shorts, and casual clothing that honour the coastal heritage of Portugal.

name: Labour Union
description: Labour Union is a Chinese brand dedicated to meticulous reproduction of vintage American and Japanese workwear, with extraordinary attention to historical detail and period-accurate construction.

name: Lady White Co.
description: Lady White Co. is a Los Angeles brand focused on premium American basics. Known for high-quality T-shirts, sweatshirts, and knitwear in exceptional fabrics, the brand often draws on athletic and sportswear silhouettes for a clean, refined result.

name: Lardini
description: Lardini was founded in Filottrano in 1978. Known for quality unstructured jackets and suits in fine fabrics, the brand produces under its own label and for other houses, consistently delivering Italian craft at its most wearable.

name: Lavenham
description: Lavenham is an English brand from Lavenham, Suffolk. Known for their quilted jackets and gilets using traditional quilting techniques in a range of British and country-inspired colours and fabrics.

name: Le Laboureur
description: Le Laboureur is a French workwear brand with roots in Villers-Bretonneux going back to 1956. Known for traditional French work jackets in sturdy cotton twill, moleskin, and canvas, the brand honours the authentic aesthetic of French labour culture.

name: Lee
description: Lee was founded in Salina, Kansas in 1889 by Henry David Lee. One of the original American denim brands, Lee introduced the first zip fly in jeans and remains a benchmark for American workwear denim.

name: Left Field NYC
description: Left Field NYC was founded in New York by Chris Mote in 2008. The brand produces American-made selvedge denim and vintage-inspired workwear in its own Lower East Side studio.

name: Lemaire
description: Lemaire was founded in Paris by Christophe Lemaire and Sarah-Linh Tran. Known for beautifully minimal and functional clothing with an emphasis on natural fabrics, generous silhouettes, and understated elegance that deepens with each season.

name: Levi's Vintage Clothing
description: Levi's Vintage Clothing is Levi Strauss and Co.'s premium line dedicated to reproducing historic Levi's garments using period-accurate fabrics, construction methods, and hardware, often produced on original vintage machinery.

name: LL Bean
description: L.L.Bean is a Freeport, Maine outdoor retailer and brand founded in 1912 by Leon Leonwood Bean. Known for their iconic Bean Boot, flannel shirts, and canvas tote bags, the brand has built its reputation on practical, lasting quality.

name: Loake
description: Loake is a Northampton shoemaker founded in 1880 by the three Loake brothers. The brand produces traditional English dress shoes and boots using Goodyear welt construction, offering solid craft at accessible prices.

name: Loro Piana
description: Loro Piana was founded in Quarona, Piedmont in 1924. Known for producing some of the world's finest fabrics in vicuna, cashmere, and baby cashmere, the brand makes luxury ready-to-wear clothing and accessories that represent the pinnacle of natural fiber quality.

name: Ludwig Reiter
description: Ludwig Reiter is a Viennese shoemaker and leather goods brand founded in 1885. Known for beautifully made Austrian shoes and boots rooted in Central European craft traditions, the brand produces its footwear in its own Vienna factory.

name: Luigi Bianchi Mantova
description: Luigi Bianchi Mantova was founded in Mantua in 1911. The brand produces impeccably crafted suits and jackets in exceptional fabrics, with a cleaner, more structured Northern Italian sensibility that complements its Neapolitan counterparts.

name: Luigi Borrelli
description: Luigi Borrelli is a Neapolitan shirtmaker and menswear brand founded in 1957. Known for extraordinary dress shirts with hand-stitched details and exceptional cotton fabrics, the brand is considered among the finest shirt makers in Italy.

name: Mackintosh
description: Mackintosh was founded in Glasgow in 1823, where Charles Mackintosh invented the rubberised cotton waterproofing process that bears his name. The brand makes its iconic rubberised raincoats in Cumbernauld, Scotland, using the same process it has always used.

name: Madewell
description: Madewell was founded in 2006 as a J.Crew subsidiary. Known for quality denim, casual clothing, and accessories with a Brooklyn sensibility, the brand has built a following on honest, lasting basics.

name: Magee 1866
description: Magee 1866 is a Donegal, Ireland tweed weaver and clothier founded in 1866. Known for hand-woven Donegal tweeds and tailored garments made from their own cloth, the brand is rooted in the long Irish textile heritage of the northwest.

name: MAN 1924
description: MAN 1924 is a London artisan shoemaking brand producing quality Goodyear-welted shoes and boots with a focus on traditional craft and classic English design.

name: Mango Man
description: Mango Man is the menswear line of Spanish brand Mango, founded in Barcelona in 1984. Known for contemporary European style at accessible prices.

name: Margaret Howell
description: Margaret Howell is a British designer brand founded in 1970. Known for understated, practical clothing that combines functionality with elegant simplicity, the brand produces primarily in Britain and Japan with a commitment to quality materials.

name: Mason's
description: Mason's is an Italian trouser brand founded in 1948. Known for quality chinos, cargo trousers, and casual pants with an Italian sensibility, the brand uses quality fabrics and clean construction.

name: Massimo Alba
description: Massimo Alba is an Italian designer and brand based in Milan. Known for beautifully soft outerwear and casualwear in exceptional fabrics, the brand has a particular mastery of garment dyeing that gives each piece an organic, lived-in quality.

name: Maurizio Baldassari
description: Maurizio Baldassari is an Italian menswear brand from Milan known for relaxed, elegant casualwear in exceptional fabrics, with particular strength in knitwear and lightweight outerwear.

name: Mazarin
description: French hosiery brand created by tailor Alain Stark of Stark and Sons. Known for the green socks of the Academie Francaise, originally embroidered with olive branches since 1801. Produces socks in cotton lisle, wool, and their Super-Durable range, plus underwear and sport socks. Sold exclusively through Mes Chaussettes Rouges.

name: Meccariello
description: Meccariello is a Neapolitan shoemaker known for exceptional handcrafted shoes that combine the finest Neapolitan craft with a contemporary design sensibility.

name: Meermin
description: Meermin is a Madrid-based shoemaker offering Goodyear-welted shoes at highly accessible price points. Founded in Mallorca with showrooms across multiple cities, the brand delivers classic styles in quality leathers.

name: Merz b. Schwanen
description: Merz b. Schwanen is a German knitwear brand from Albstadt, Swabia, with roots going back to 1911. The brand produces authentic loop-wheeled T-shirts, sweatshirts, and underwear on vintage machinery, recreating the distinctive soft hand of pre-war German sportswear.

name: Mes Chaussettes Rouges
description: Paris-based specialist in fine hosiery. Makes bespoke socks in-house on their own knitting machine, and carries collections from Bresciani, Gammarelli, Mazarin, Gallo, and Dore Dore. Materials range from cotton lisle and merino to cashmere, silk, and vicuna. Also stocks underwear, pocket squares, fragrances, and shoe care.

name: Mister Freedom
description: Mister Freedom is a Los Angeles brand founded by Christophe Loiron in 1998. The brand produces handcrafted clothing inspired by American Westerns, workwear, military, and sporting heritage, with extraordinary attention to historical detail.

name: Monitaly
description: Monitaly is a California brand by Yuki Matsuda. The brand produces distinctive clothing that blends American military and workwear references with Japanese and Italian craft sensibilities, creating pieces that are genuinely hard to categorise.

name: MooRER
description: MooRER is an Italian brand from the Veneto. Known for premium down jackets and outerwear that combine technical performance with Italian tailored aesthetics, the brand produces its garments with the same care as traditional Italian clothing.

name: Moreschi
description: Moreschi was founded in Vigevano in 1946. Known for high-quality, hand-stitched loafers and dress shoes with a classic Italian aesthetic, the brand has been producing fine footwear for over seven decades.

name: Mott & Bow
description: Mott and Bow is a New York brand offering quality selvedge denim and basics at direct-to-consumer prices.

name: Muji
description: Muji was founded in Japan in 1980. Known for simple, functional products across clothing, furniture, and household goods, the brand's clothing is characterised by natural fabrics, minimal branding, and practical design.

name: Muttonhead
description: Muttonhead was founded in Toronto in 2010. The brand produces Canadian-made knitwear and casualwear using premium natural fibers, with a focus on quality and heritage manufacturing.

name: Myrqvist
description: Myrqvist was founded in Sweden in 2017. The brand offers Goodyear-welted shoes made in Poland at direct-to-consumer prices, known for Scandinavian-influenced design and quality leathers.

name: N. Hoolywood
description: N. Hoolywood was founded in Tokyo by Daisuke Obana in 2000. The brand draws deeply from American vintage clothing and pop culture references to produce exceptionally detailed contemporary collections.

name: N.Peal
description: N.Peal is a London luxury knitwear brand based in Burlington Arcade since 1936. Known for exceptional cashmere from Mongolian herds, the brand produces fine knitwear at the top of the British cashmere market.

name: Naked & Famous
description: Naked and Famous Denim is a Montreal brand founded in 2008 by Brandon Svarc. Known for experimental selvedge denim using unusual Japanese fabrics including glow-in-the-dark, thermochromic, and ultra-heavyweight weaves.

name: Natalino
description: Natalino is a Stockholm tailoring brand known for quality Neapolitan-inspired suits and sport coats made in Italy with a Scandinavian sensibility and clean, restrained aesthetic.

name: Nicks Boots
description: Nicks Boots is a Spokane, Washington boot manufacturer making heavy-duty work and logger boots by hand using traditional techniques. The brand is known for its resolable construction and a wide customization program.

name: Nigel Cabourn
description: Nigel Cabourn is a Consett, County Durham designer and brand founded in 1971. Known for archive-driven collections inspired by British military history and the wardrobes of climbers, explorers, and sportsmen, the brand produces clothing of great depth and character.

name: Nitto Knitwear
description: Nitto Knitwear is a Japanese knitwear manufacturer producing quality sweaters and knitwear using traditional Japanese production techniques.

name: NN07
description: NN07 is a Copenhagen brand founded in 2002. The brand produces contemporary Scandinavian menswear with an emphasis on wearable basics in natural fabrics, designed for the modern urban wardrobe.

name: Noah NYC
description: Noah NYC was founded in New York by Brendan Babenzien in 2015. The brand combines surf, skate, and punk influences with a strong ethical position and quality materials, drawing from archival sportswear and military references.

name: NoManWalksAlone
description: NoManWalksAlone is a New York retailer and brand founded by Gregory Lellouche. Known for curating exceptional European and Japanese brands while producing a house line of quality tailoring and accessories.

name: Nonnative
description: Nonnative was founded in Tokyo in 1999 by Takahiro Kogure. The brand produces clean, functional casualwear drawing from outdoor, military, and travel aesthetics, with a strong focus on fabric quality and considered construction.

name: Norda
description: Norda is a Montreal trail running shoe brand founded in 2021 by Nick Martire and William Kanso. Known for bio-based materials including Dyneema uppers and Biobase midsoles, the brand combines running performance with sustainable construction.

name: Norhla
description: Norlha is a Tibetan brand producing handwoven yak fiber garments and scarves using traditional weaving techniques from the Tibetan plateau. Each piece is made by nomadic artisans using fibers from the yaks that share their land.

name: Norse Projects
description: Norse Projects is a Copenhagen brand founded in 2004. Known for clean Scandinavian design, quality fabrics, and technical influences, the brand produces jackets, knitwear, and basics that balance function with quiet aesthetic confidence.

name: Nudie Jeans
description: Nudie Jeans is a Gothenburg denim brand founded in 2001. Known for premium organic denim and a commitment to sustainability, the brand runs a free repairs programme that encourages customers to maintain rather than replace their jeans.

name: Oak Street Bootmakers
description: Oak Street Bootmakers is a Chicago bootmaker founded by Johnny Murata. The brand makes American-crafted boots and shoes using traditional construction methods including hand-sewn moccasin, Norwegian welt, and Blake stitching.

name: OAS Company
description: OAS Company is a Copenhagen brand known for vibrant resort wear, particularly its terry cloth shirts, shorts sets, and colourful swimwear. A summer wardrobe staple defined by easy, unhurried design.

name: Octobre Ã‰ditions
description: Octobre Editions is a Paris brand known for clean, minimalist casualwear and accessories with a refined French aesthetic.

name: Officine GÃ©nÃ©rale
description: Officine Generale was founded in Paris in 2012 by Pierre Maheo. Known for quality, understated French casualwear and tailoring that draws from workwear, military, and sporting heritage without ever feeling derivative.

name: Oliver Spencer
description: Oliver Spencer was founded in London in 2003 by Oliver Spencer. Known for quality British casualwear and tailoring with a relaxed, artisanal sensibility, the brand produces much of its range in the UK and Europe.

name: Oni Denim
description: Oni Denim is a Japanese denim brand known for its distinctive zero denim process, which uses very fine weft yarns to create an exceptionally soft, cloud-like texture unlike any other selvedge fabric on the market.

name: Orazio Luciano
description: Orazio Luciano is a Neapolitan tailoring house producing soft-shoulder suits and sport coats with the distinctive drape of Neapolitan construction, made by hand in the brand's Naples workshop.

name: Orlebar Brown
description: Orlebar Brown was founded in London in 2007 by Adam Brown. Known for tailored swim shorts in quality fabrics and a wider resort and holiday wardrobe suited to the modern traveller.

name: Orslow
description: Orslow is a Japanese brand founded in 2005 by Ichiro Nakatsu. Known for simple, well-made Japanese interpretations of American and European vintage workwear and casual classics, the brand takes a clean, unhurried approach to every piece.

name: Our Legacy
description: Our Legacy was founded in Stockholm in 2005 by Jockum Hallin and Christopher Nying. Known for distinctive Scandinavian design with exceptional fabrics and thoughtful construction, the brand balances accessibility with genuine quality.

name: Outclass
description: Outclass is a Toronto brand known for quality casualwear and streetwear with a strong Canadian identity.

name: Outlier
description: Outlier is a New York brand founded in 2008. The brand makes technical urban clothing from high-performance fabrics, producing trousers, shirts, and outerwear designed for city commuting and travel without sacrificing appearance.

name: Outstanding & Co.
description: Outstanding and Co. is a Seoul brand known for quality casualwear and workwear-inspired garments with meticulous construction and a Korean approach to proportion and detail.

name: Paraboot
description: Paraboot is a French footwear brand founded in 1908 in Izeaux, near Grenoble. Known for robust Norwegian-welted boots and the iconic Michael loafer, the brand makes its footwear using traditional French shoemaking methods in its own factory.

name: Parel Studio
description: Parel Studio is an Amsterdam brand known for quality resort and casualwear with a clean, contemporary aesthetic.

name: Parkhurst
description: Parkhurst is a Canadian brand known for quality lambswool and merino knitwear made in Canada using traditional knitting techniques.

name: Pasotti
description: Italian luxury umbrella and accessories maker, est. 1956 in Castellucchio. Handmade with Swarovski crystal handles and Italian silk canopies. Limited editions sold in prestigious boutiques worldwide.

name: Patagonia
description: Patagonia is a Ventura, California outdoor brand founded by Yvon Chouinard in 1973. A pioneer in environmental activism and sustainable manufacturing, the brand is known for its fleece jackets and a commitment to repairing rather than replacing worn garments.

name: Paul & Shark
description: Paul and Shark was founded in Varese in 1976 by Paolo Dini. Known for premium sailing and nautical-inspired clothing, particularly its water-resistant knitwear and outerwear, the brand carries a strong identity rooted in the sea.

name: Paul Smith
description: Paul Smith is a British designer brand founded in Nottingham in 1970. Known for its distinctive use of colour and pattern, the brand combines traditional British tailoring with wit, irreverence, and a personal creative vision that has shaped British fashion.

name: Pendleton
description: Pendleton is a Portland, Oregon woollen mills brand founded in 1909. Known for its distinctive plaid and blanket-stripe wool shirts and blankets, the brand makes its products in its own mills in Oregon and Washington using American wool.

name: Percival
description: Percival is a London brand known for quality casualwear and knitwear with distinctive patterns and a bright, confident colour palette.

name: Peter Millar
description: Peter Millar was founded in North Carolina in 2001. Known for premium American sportswear, casualwear, and golf clothing in exceptional natural fabrics, the brand occupies a refined position in the American lifestyle market.

name: Petru & Claymoor
description: Petru and Claymoor is a small premium brand known for quality tailoring and casualwear.

name: Pike Brothers
description: Pike Brothers is a German heritage brand producing quality reproduction workwear and outerwear inspired by American vintage, German military surplus, and outdoor heritage.

name: Pini Parma
description: Pini Parma is an Italian accessories brand known for handcrafted bags, wallets, and leather goods made in Parma using traditional Italian techniques.

name: Portuguese Flannel
description: Portuguese Flannel is a Porto brand founded in 2010 that draws on Portugal's centuries-old textile tradition. Known for high-quality flannel and chambray shirts made in Porto using locally produced fabrics and traditional methods.

name: Poszetka
description: Poszetka is a Polish accessories brand known for quality pocket squares and neckwear made from fine European fabrics.

name: Prada
description: Prada is a Milan luxury fashion house founded in 1913 by Mario Prada. Known for an intellectual approach to fashion, technical fabric innovation, and the ability to balance the avant-garde with classical refinement.

name: Pringlescotland
description: Pringle of Scotland was founded in Hawick in 1815 by Robert Pringle. One of Scotland's oldest knitwear brands, Pringle is known for fine merino and cashmere knitwear and for being widely credited with introducing the argyle pattern to fashion.

name: Private White V.C.
description: Private White V.C. was founded in honour of Jack White, Private in the Lancashire Fusiliers, the most decorated private soldier of the First World War. The brand produces high-quality outerwear and knitwear entirely in Britain using British fabrics, reviving Manchester's garment-making heritage.

name: Proper Cloth
description: Proper Cloth is a New York shirt brand offering custom shirts made to individual measurements. The brand uses premium fabrics from leading mills and traditional construction for dress and casual shirts that fit precisely.

name: Province of Canada
description: Province of Canada was founded in Montreal in 2012. Dedicated to producing Canadian-made basics and casualwear in quality fabrics, the brand has a strong local identity and a genuine commitment to domestic manufacturing.

name: PT01 / PT Torino
description: PT01 is an Italian trouser specialist founded in 1976 in Turin. Known for slim, clean trousers in premium fabrics including cotton, wool, and technical blends, the brand is a fixture of the smart casual Italian wardrobe.

name: Pure Blue Japan
description: Pure Blue Japan is an Okayama denim brand founded in 2007 by Hajime Inoue. Known for its natural indigo dyeing process using plants grown in Tokushima, Japan, the brand produces denim with exceptional colour depth and distinctive fade character.

name: Raised by Wolves
description: Canadian streetwear brand founded 2008 in Ottawa by Pete Williams. Contemporary menswear, classic sportswear, and technical outerwear. Made in Canada. Supports 1% for the Planet.

name: Rancourt & Co
description: Rancourt and Co. is a Lewiston, Maine footwear brand founded in 1945. Known for handcrafted moccasin-construction shoes, boots, and handsewn footwear made in the USA.

name: Re-HasH
description: Re-HasH is an Italian brand from the Veneto known for quality trousers and casualwear with an Italian sensibility and clean, considered construction.

name: Red Wing
description: Red Wing Shoes was founded in Red Wing, Minnesota in 1905 by Charles Beckman. Known for heavy-duty work boots in moc-toe and cap-toe silhouettes built using Goodyear welt construction, the brand makes its footwear in its own Minnesota factory.

name: Red Wing Heritage
description: Red Wing Heritage is the lifestyle-focused line of Red Wing Shoes, bringing heritage models including the Iron Ranger, Beckman, and Classic Moc to a broader audience beyond the original work boot market.

name: Reigning Champ
description: Reigning Champ is a Vancouver premium basics brand founded in 2007. Known for fleece and French terry sweatshirts and sweatpants made in Canada using the finest loopback and fleece fabrics available, the brand sets a consistent standard in premium basics.

name: Relwen
description: Relwen is a New York brand known for quality outerwear and casualwear inspired by American heritage and outdoor traditions.

name: Resolute
description: Resolute is an Osaka denim brand founded by Hayashi Yukihiro. Known for producing exceptional vintage-inspired denim using narrow-width selvedge fabric and traditional construction, the brand is dedicated to the craft of Japanese denim making.

name: Ring Jacket
description: Ring Jacket was founded in Osaka in 1954. Known for producing some of the finest ready-to-wear suits in Japan, the brand uses a high degree of handcraft including hand-sewn buttonholes and hand-padded canvassing.

name: Rocky Mountain Featherbed
description: Rocky Mountain Featherbed is a Jackson, Wyoming brand founded in 1970. Known for quilted down vests and jackets inspired by the American West, the brand is valued for lightweight, packable warmth and enduring design.

name: Rodd & Gunn
description: Rodd and Gunn is a New Zealand lifestyle brand founded in 1946 in Christchurch. The brand produces quality outdoor and lifestyle clothing with a Southern Hemisphere sensibility, drawing on New Zealand merino wool and natural materials.

name: Rogue Territory
description: Rogue Territory was founded in Los Angeles in 2008. The brand produces American-made selvedge denim and heritage workwear, known for quality construction and a direct-to-consumer model.

name: Roots
description: Roots was founded in Toronto in 1973 by Michael Budman and Don Green. Known for quality leather goods, sweatpants, and casualwear with a strong Canadian identity, the brand has been a fixture of Canadian culture for over fifty years.

name: Rota
description: Rota is a Bergamo-based Italian trouser specialist founded in 1945. Known for high-waisted, wide-leg trousers in exceptional fabrics made in Bergamo using traditional techniques, the brand is a reference point for trouser craft among menswear enthusiasts.

name: RRD
description: RRD was founded by Roberto Ricci in Rende, Calabria. Known for high-performance sailing and outdoor jackets that blend technical function with Italian design, the brand brings a genuine maritime pedigree to its outerwear.

name: RRL (Ralph Lauren)
description: RRL is Ralph Lauren's premium vintage-inspired line, launched in 1993 and named after Lauren's Colorado ranch. The collection draws deeply from American Western, military, and workwear heritage to produce beautifully researched and executed garments.

name: Rubinacci
description: Rubinacci is a Neapolitan tailoring house with origins in the early twentieth century. One of the most influential of the Neapolitan sartorial houses, the brand is known for the distinctive draped shoulder and an innovative approach to Neapolitan style under Luca Rubinacci.

name: Russell Moccasin
description: Russell Moccasin is a Spring Green, Wisconsin bootmaker founded in 1898. The brand makes fully handmade hunting and outdoor boots using its distinctive Sportsman construction, customizable across dozens of leather and specification options.

name: Sagara / Ambiorix
description: Ambiorix is a Belgian shoemaker based in Izegem known for producing quality Goodyear-welted shoes in the Belgian tradition, with a long history in the town's proud shoemaking heritage.

name: Sage de Cret
description: Sage de Cret is a Japanese brand known for relaxed, well-crafted casualwear drawing from workwear and outdoor references with exceptional fabric sourcing and a warm, natural sensibility.

name: Sage Nation
description: Sage Nation is a British brand known for quality casualwear and accessories.

name: Saint Crispin's
description: Saint Crispin's is an Austrian shoemaker based in Vienna, founded by Michael Rolland and Phillip Carroll. Known for bespoke and made-to-order shoes of extraordinary quality, combining Austrian craftsmanship with contemporary design.

name: Salvatore Piccolo
description: Salvatore Piccolo is a Neapolitan shirtmaker known for hand-stitched dress shirts in exceptional fabrics, continuing the finest traditions of Neapolitan shirtmaking.

name: Saman Amel
description: Saman Amel is a Stockholm tailoring brand founded in 2014 by Saman Amel and Dag Granath. Known for a distinctive approach that blends Neapolitan soft construction with Northern European restraint and rigour.

name: Samuelsohn
description: Samuelsohn is a Montreal tailoring brand founded in 1923. One of North America's most respected suit manufacturers, the brand is known for quality construction and fine fabrics at accessible prices relative to its level of craftsmanship.

name: Sanders & Sanders
description: Sanders and Sanders is a Northampton shoemaker founded in 1873. The brand produces classic British Goodyear-welted shoes and boots in the traditional English manner.

name: Sandqvist
description: Sandqvist was founded in Stockholm in 2004. Known for quality backpacks, bags, and accessories in organic cotton, leather, and recycled materials with a clean Scandinavian aesthetic.

name: Sandro
description: Sandro is a Paris-based contemporary brand founded in 1984 by Evelyne Chetrite. Known for French contemporary fashion with a focus on quality fabrics and Parisian sensibility at accessible prices.

name: Santoni
description: Santoni was founded in Sant'Elpidio a Mare in 1975 by Andrea Santoni. Known for exceptional leather shoes and boots, the brand is particularly admired for its expertly hand-burnished and patinated models.

name: Sartoria Partenopea
description: Sartoria Partenopea is a Neapolitan tailoring brand producing quality soft-construction Neapolitan suits and jackets, based in Naples.

name: Sartorio Napoli
description: Sartorio Napoli is a Neapolitan tailoring brand founded in 1956, part of the Kiton group. The brand produces soft-constructed Neapolitan jackets and suits with a more relaxed, casual character than its parent house.

name: Sassafras
