description: Sassafras is a Japanese brand known for distinctive botanical-themed graphics and quality workwear-inspired garments drawing from American outdoor and military heritage.

name: Saturdays NYC
description: Saturdays NYC was founded in 2009 by Morgan Collett, Josh Rosen, and Colin Tunstall. Known for surf-inspired casualwear and distinctive shirts, the brand operates flagship stores in New York, Sydney, and Tokyo.

name: Save Khaki United
description: Save Khaki United was founded in New York in 1999. The brand produces American military-inspired basics in fine fabrics, known for garment-dyed chinos, simple shirts, and an understated quality that improves with repeated wear.

name: Scarosso
description: Scarosso is an Italian footwear brand producing quality Blake-stitched shoes and boots in Civitanova Marche using fine Italian leathers.

name: Schott NYC
description: Schott NYC was founded in New York in 1913 by Irving Schott. The brand created the first commercial leather motorcycle jacket, the Perfecto, and has been producing quality American-made leather jackets and outerwear ever since.

name: Scott Fraser
description: Scott Fraser Collection is a premium accessories and clothing brand known for quality Scottish and British-made goods.

name: Sease
description: Sease was founded in 2018 by Marco Boglione of the Slowear group. Known for luxury outerwear made from exceptional materials including rare cashmere and technical fabrics, the brand combines Italian elegance with genuine outdoor performance.

name: SeptiÃ¨me Largeur
description: Septieme Largeur is a Paris footwear brand known for quality loafers and dress shoes made in Portugal and Italy, with a refined Parisian aesthetic and a focus on accessible luxury.

name: Settefili Cashmere
description: Settefili Cashmere is an Italian knitwear brand producing fine cashmere garments in Italy, with a focus on quality natural fibers and traditional knitwear techniques.

name: Shibumi Firenze
description: Shibumi Firenze is a Florentine accessories brand founded by Mario Avagliano. Known for exceptional neckwear, pocket squares, and accessories in the finest Italian and British fabrics, the brand carries a deep commitment to Florentine sartorial tradition.

name: Shockoe Atelier
description: Shockoe Atelier is a Richmond, Virginia brand producing American-made selvedge denim jeans, with a focus on local manufacturing and quality materials.

name: Sid Mashburn
description: Sid Mashburn is an Atlanta brand founded by Sid Mashburn. Known for intelligent, wearable American tailoring with genuine personality, the brand combines craftsmanship with the kind of warmth and approachability that sets it apart from more formal houses.

name: Solovair
description: Solovair is a British boot brand based in Wollaston, Northamptonshire, with roots spanning over a century as the original manufacturer of the iconic air-cushion sole boot. The brand still produces entirely in England using traditional methods.

name: Son of a Tailor
description: Son of a Tailor is a Copenhagen brand offering made-to-fit knitwear and basics produced to the customer's exact measurements using a proprietary fit algorithm developed from thousands of body scans.

name: Spencer Badu
description: Spencer Badu is a Toronto designer known for minimalist, functional garments with a strong commitment to quality production and thoughtful, considered design.

name: Spier & Mackay
description: Canadian formalwear label offering exceptional value on suits, sport coats, and dress shirts. Known for half-canvassed construction and quality Italian and English fabrics at a fraction of traditional retail pricing.

name: Stan Ray
description: Stan Ray is an American workwear brand with roots in military garment manufacturing. Known for rugged painter pants, fatigue trousers, and work shirts in domestic fabrics, the brand has a direct and honest identity.

name: Sterlingwear
description: Sterlingwear is a Boston, Massachusetts outerwear manufacturer founded in 1958. Known for producing authentic US Navy pea coats and American heritage outerwear in its own factory using traditional construction methods.

name: Still by Hand
description: Still by Hand is a Japanese menswear brand founded by Ken Miyoshi in 2001. Known for relaxed, tailored garments that combine Japanese craft with European influences in a muted, natural palette suited to thoughtful everyday dressing.

name: Studio D'Artisan
description: Studio D'Artisan is an Osaka denim brand founded in 1979 and one of the original Japanese selvedge denim brands. Known for heavyweight fabrics and vintage-inspired workwear made with precision on vintage shuttle looms, it remains a benchmark for the craft.

name: Studio Donegal
description: Studio Donegal is an Irish craft studio in the Donegal Gaeltacht, producing hand-woven tweed and knitwear using traditional techniques that are woven into the fabric of the local community and landscape.

name: Sugar Cane
description: Sugar Cane is a Toyo Enterprise brand dedicated to reproduction of vintage American workwear and denim. The brand often incorporates distinctive Japanese tweed and stripe fabrics that give its pieces their own character within the reproduction genre.

name: Suitsupply
description: Suitsupply was founded in Amsterdam in 2000 by Fokke de Jong. The brand offers well-made suits, sport coats, and tailoring at accessible prices, with a global retail presence and a strong made-to-measure program.

name: Sunspel
description: Sunspel was founded in Long Eaton, Nottinghamshire in 1860. Known for high-quality cotton T-shirts, underwear, and casual clothing made in England, the brand is credited with creating the original James Bond short-sleeve polo shirt.

name: SÃ©fr
description: Sefr was founded in Stockholm in 2015 by Sandro Gros-Louis and Max Hansson. The brand produces relaxed, easy-wearing menswear with a strong knitwear program and a colour palette shaped by Nordic light and Scandinavian sensibility.

name: Taylor Stitch
brandPositioning: San Francisco workwear rooted in durable fabrics and honest construction. Built to last
description:
Taylor Stitch was founded in 2010 in San Francisco by a group of guys who couldn't find shirts that fit like they used to. What started as a made-to-measure shirting operation has grown into one of the most consistently respected workwear-adjacent brands in North America.

The brand runs on a workshop model â€” customers pre-fund upcoming batches in exchange for a discount, which lets the team source better fabrics and keep inventory lean. It's an honest approach in an industry built on hype and overstock.

Construction quality is a genuine differentiator. The stitching, buttonholes, and fabric choices are made with longevity in mind. Their denim, chambray, and canvas shirts hold up across years of wear in a way that few brands at this price point can match.

name: TCB Jeans
description: TCB Jeans is an Osaka denim brand founded in 2014 by Tatsuya Kuwata. The brand produces authentic reproduction selvedge denim garments inspired by mid-century American workwear, using vintage looms and period-accurate hardware throughout.

name: Tecovas
description: Tecovas is an Austin, Texas boot brand founded in 2015 by Paul Hedrick. The brand offers handcrafted Western boots at direct-to-consumer prices, made in Leon, Mexico using traditional cowboy boot construction.

name: Tellason
description: Tellason was founded in San Francisco in 2008 by Tony Patella and Pete Searson. The brand produces selvedge denim jeans using American Cone Mills denim milled in North Carolina, cut and sewn in San Francisco.

name: The Anthology
description: The Anthology is a Singapore and Hong Kong menswear brand known for quality tailoring and casualwear curated and produced for the Asian market with a considered, global perspective.

name: The Armoury
description: The Armoury is a Hong Kong and New York retailer and brand that curates the finest in classic menswear from around the world, and runs its own tailoring program in partnership with Neapolitan and English makers.

name: The Gigi
description: The Gigi is an Italian knitwear brand from Bergamo known for quality merino and cashmere knitwear with a relaxed Italian sensibility.

name: The Iron Snail
description: The Iron Snail is a small American brand producing high-quality workwear and heritage clothing with an emphasis on American-made materials and traditional construction.

name: The Real McCoy's
description: The Real McCoy's is a Japanese brand dedicated to faithful reproduction of American military and aviation clothing from the Second World War era, using period-accurate materials and construction methods made in Japan.

name: The Unbranded Brand
description: The Unbranded Brand is a Los Angeles denim brand known for producing raw selvedge denim jeans without visible branding, using Japanese fabrics at accessible prices.

name: Thursday Boot Co.
description: Thursday Boot Co. is a Minneapolis footwear brand founded in 2013. The brand makes resolable boots and shoes using premium leathers and Goodyear welt construction, delivered at accessible prices through a direct-to-consumer model.

name: Tlb Mallorca
description: TLB Mallorca is a Mallorca-based shoemaker known for quality Goodyear-welted shoes made in Spain at accessible prices, with a wide range of classic styles.

name: Todd Snyder
description: Todd Snyder is a New York designer brand founded in 2011 by Todd Snyder, former head of design at J.Crew. Known for Americana-inspired tailoring and casual clothing with a modern, accessible sensibility.

name: Tricker's
description: Tricker's is a Northampton shoemaker founded in 1829 by Joseph Tricker. One of England's oldest shoemakers, the brand is known for country and hunting boots, brogues, and robust outdoor footwear made in Northampton.

name: Truman Boot Co.
description: Truman Boot Co. is a Spokane, Washington boot brand founded by Ryan Messina. The brand makes handcrafted American boots using premium leathers and traditional construction, known for quality and a thorough customization program.

name: Undercoverism
description: Undercoverism is the more accessible line from Tokyo designer Jun Takahashi. The brand offers wearable pieces that carry the Undercover aesthetic in a more approachable format.

name: Uniqlo
description: Uniqlo was founded in Yamaguchi, Japan in 1984 by Tadashi Yanai. Known for high-quality basics at accessible prices including Heattech thermal wear, Ultra Light Down, and acclaimed designer collaboration lines, the brand has become a global wardrobe staple.

name: Valstar
description: Valstar is an Italian outerwear brand founded in Milan in 1911. The brand is credited as the originator of the Valstarino, a lightweight cotton jacket that is considered one of the precursors of the modern Harrington and blouson silhouette.

name: Velasca
description: Velasca was founded in Milan in 2013 by Enrico Casati and Jacopo Sebastio. The brand produces handcrafted shoes and boots in the Marche region at fair prices, connecting customers directly with skilled Italian artisans.

name: Vetra
description: Vetra is a French workwear brand founded in 1927. Known for traditional French work jackets and coveralls in moleskin and cotton twill, the brand represents the authentic aesthetic of French blue-collar workwear culture.

name: Viberg
description: Viberg is a Victoria, British Columbia bootmaker founded in 1931. The brand produces handcrafted boots using traditional techniques and premium leathers, known for meticulous construction and a flexible customization program.

name: Vuori
description: Vuori was founded in Encinitas, California in 2015 by Joe Kudla. The brand makes performance activewear designed for outdoor activities and training, balancing function with clean, minimal aesthetics.

name: Walker Slater
description: Walker Slater is an Edinburgh brand specializing in quality Harris Tweed jackets, suits, and outerwear, connecting the traditional craft of the Outer Hebrides weavers with a contemporary retail wardrobe.

name: WANT Les Essentiels
description: WANT Les Essentiels was founded in Montreal in 2007 by Byron and Dexter Peart. Known for minimal, functional bags, wallets, and accessories in quality materials with a clean urban aesthetic.

name: Warehouse & Co.
description: Warehouse and Co. is an Osaka brand founded in 1995, part of the Hinoya group. The brand produces exceptionally detailed reproductions of American vintage workwear and denim, placing authenticity and craft above design novelty.

name: White's Boots
description: White's Boots is a Spokane, Washington bootmaker founded in 1853. One of America's oldest bootmakers, the brand handcrafts firefighter, logger, and work boots using traditional techniques and premium leathers.

name: Whitesville
description: Whitesville is a Japanese brand by Toyo Enterprise specializing in authentic reproductions of vintage American athletic and casual knitwear, particularly sweatshirts, T-shirts, and athletic wear from the 1940s and 1960s.

name: Wolf vs Goat
description: Wolf vs Goat is a small premium menswear brand focused on refined, tailored casualwear in quality natural fabrics.

name: Wonder Looper
description: Wonder Looper is a small brand specializing in loop-wheel knit garments including T-shirts and sweatshirts made on vintage loop-wheel machines, producing a distinctive softness and durability uncommon in contemporary basics.

name: Wrangler
description: Wrangler was founded in Greensboro, North Carolina in 1947. Known as the official denim brand of rodeo and Western culture, the brand is famed for its Pro Rodeo and 13MWZ styles worn by cowboys and rodeo riders worldwide.

name: Wythe
description: Wythe was founded in New York by Matthew Mueller in 2010. Known for premium knitwear and casualwear made from fine natural fibers, the brand emphasises quality and understated design.

name: Zegna
description: Zegna was founded in Trivero, Piedmont in 1910 by Ermenegildo Zegna. One of the world's largest producers of fine suiting fabrics, the brand also produces luxury ready-to-wear and bespoke clothing under the Zegna name.
